name: Xue Lan Liu
description: Xue Lan Liu is an assassin. She is known as Untouchable because of her strength, and the fact that she is the number 1 ranked player in Japan.

name: Yan Su
description: __Species:__ Human (Phoenix Cultivation Bloodline) __Body Type:__ Ice Crystal Jade Body Su Yan was an elite disciple of High Heaven Pavilion when Yang Kai was still at the rank of trial-disciple. She eventually marries Yang Kai to become his first wife, and then becomes a follower of Yang Kai's High Heaven Palace in the upper realm. ~!
